locations.name: Chaîne de la Selle
locations.summary: Chaîne de la Selle (French pronunciation: [ʃɛn də la sɛl]) is a mountain range in Haiti, on the island of Hispaniola.

locations.name: 藍山 (牙買加)
locations.summary: 蓝山（Blue Mountains），牙买加东部山脉。从金斯敦以北13公里处的斯托尼希尔向东延伸约50公里到加勒比海，最高点蓝山峰海拔2,256 米 (7402 ft)。山上长着茂密的蕨类植物，面向信风的山坡年均降雨量5000毫米。冬季温…

relations.subject: Hispaniolan crossbill
relations.evidence: It is found in Haiti in the Massif de la Selle and Massif de la Hotte

relations.subject: Hispaniolan crossbill

relations.subject: Hispaniolan crossbill
relations.evidence: In the Dominican Republic it is found in the Sierra de Bahoruco and Cordillera Central. A few individuals in Jamaica's Blue Mountains in the 1970s are believed to have been vagrants. The species inhabits forests of Hispaniolan pine (Pinus occidentalis)
